title: Add History Lens derived navigation
goal: Design or implement optional History Lens navigation for churn, blame condensation and commit/PR provenance chains.

acceptance.assertion: History Lens is declared as derived navigation/diagnosis, not canonical content truth.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Export/profile rules govern whether history metadata may be included.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The surface forbids person blame, ownership, correctness and completeness verdicts.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: History Lens does not replace live GitHub/CI/PR checks for current work.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.outcome: Implemented by Lenskit PR #939: optional History Lens derived navigation with export-profile controls, no person-blame/ownership/correctness/completeness verdicts, and live-state boundary.

verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t009-derived: history_lens.py and history-lens-v1.md declare derived_navigation true and canonical_content_truth false.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t009-privacy: export_policy supports disabled/summary/full profiles and excludes author metadata by default; tests cover inclusion controls.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t009-no-blame-verdict: forbidden_verdicts includes person_blame, ownership, correctness and completeness; tests cover.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t009-live-boundary: live_state_boundary and docs state live GitHub/CI/PR checks remain required; tests cover.

checks: Lenskit PR #939 CI all green before merge
